testcase.name: test_ask_creates_thread_and_runs_pipeline

failure.message:
AssertionError: ask failed: 502 The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:162: in test_ask_creates_thread_and_runs_pipeline assert r.status_code == 200, f"ask failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: ask failed: 502 The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_thread_appears_in_list

failure.message: AssertionError: ask test must run first assert None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:188: in test_thread_appears_in_list assert tid, "ask test must run first" E AssertionError: ask test must run first E assert None

testcase.name: test_get_thread_messages_persisted
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:198: in test_get_thread_messages_persisted assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_semantic_cache_hit_on_repeat
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:209: in test_semantic_cache_hit_on_repeat assert q E assert None
